llm_response:
# Weekly Development Plan
This week focuses on launching our new app feature with a balanced approach to coding and testing. We will hold a collaborative brainstorming session on Monday to align on the core requirements. Please review the [Agile Manifesto](https://agilemanifesto.org/) for guidance on our workflow.

# Daily Task Breakdown
*   Monday involves planning and the initial collaborative brainstorming session.
*   Tuesday and Wednesday are dedicated to intensive coding and feature implementation.
*   Thursday shifts focus to rigorous testing and bug fixing.
*   Friday is reserved for final reviews and preparing the deployment update.

# Team Communication Schedule
The team will update stakeholders every afternoon with progress reports. We encourage open dialogue during our daily stand-ups to address any blockers quickly. Remember to keep your code comments clear so everyone can understand the logic. Let's ensure we maintain a positive and productive atmosphere throughout this sprint.
